## What changed

Describe the user-visible behavior and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `scripts/test.sh` passes.
- [ ] Installation or CLI changes were tested from a clean temporary directory.
- [ ] Documentation and examples match the current behavior.

## Content and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, cookies, QR codes, private local paths, or authorization files are included.
- [ ] No third-party article bodies or paywalled copies are included.
- [ ] New dependencies, collectors, or source disclosures are reflected in `NOTICE.md` when required.
